assertions.assertion: Client uses standard shared secret authentication (not certificate-based authentication)
assertions.rationale: Line 31 uses new Secret("secret".Sha256()) — standard shared secret.

assertions.assertion: Explains that the cnf claim with x5t#S256 will be embedded in the access token
assertions.rationale: Lines 58-63 show the cnf claim with x5t#S256 in JSON format with explanation.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the client must use a TLS client certificate when calling the token endpoint (even though the certificate is not used for authentication)
assertions.rationale: Line 71 explicitly states the client must use a TLS client certificate when calling the token endpoint, even though it is not used for authentication.
